question: How many security and privacy control families does NIST SP 800-53 Revision 5 organize its controls into?
reference: Section 2.2, page 13 (PDF page 32): "controls are organized into 20 families."

question: In NIST SP 800-53, what does the two-letter control family identifier "PS" stand for?
reference: Table 1, Section 2.2, page 13 (PDF page 32)

question: In NIST SP 800-53, what does the control family identifier "PM" stand for?
reference: Table 1, Section 2.2, page 13 (PDF page 32)

question: What is the title of control AC-2 in NIST SP 800-53?
reference: Control catalog, "AC-2 ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT"

question: What is the title of control AU-2 in NIST SP 800-53?
reference: Control catalog, "AU-2 EVENT LOGGING"

question: What is the title of control CP-9 in NIST SP 800-53?
reference: Control catalog, "CP-9 SYSTEM BACKUP"

question: What is the title of control IA-2 in NIST SP 800-53?
reference: Control catalog, "IA-2 IDENTIFICATION AND AUTHENTICATION (ORGANIZATIONAL USERS)"

question: What is the title of control SC-7 in NIST SP 800-53?
reference: Control catalog, "SC-7 BOUNDARY PROTECTION"

question: Per NIST SP 800-53 control AC-2, besides monitoring account use, what must be reviewed for compliance with account management requirements, at an organization-defined frequency?
expected_answer: Accounts (accounts must be reviewed for compliance with account management requirements)
reference: AC-2(j): "Review accounts for compliance with account management requirements [Assignment: organization-defined frequency]"

question: What publication date is listed on the cover of NIST SP 800-53 Revision 5?
reference: Cover page: "September 2020, INCLUDES UPDATES AS OF 12-10-2020"

question: What is the famous opening line of Moby-Dick?
reference: Chapter 1, "Loomings": "Call me Ishmael. Some years ago..."

question: Who is the narrator of Moby-Dick?
reference: Chapter 1 opening line and throughout the novel

question: What is the name of the whaling ship in Moby-Dick?
reference: Referenced throughout, e.g. Chapter 81 "The Pequod Meets The Virgin"

question: Who is the first (chief) mate of the Pequod in Moby-Dick?
reference: e.g. "He's a lively chief mate" referring to Starbuck; Chapter 109 "Ahab and Starbuck in the Cabin"

question: Who is the harpooner and close companion Ishmael meets and shares a bed with at the Spouter-Inn?
reference: Chapter 3, "The Spouter-Inn"

question: According to Captain Ahab himself, what did Moby Dick do to him?
expected_answer: Moby Dick dismasted him (bit off / took his leg)
reference: "...it was Moby Dick that dismasted me; Moby Dick that..."

question: What is the title of Chapter 28 in Moby-Dick?
reference: Table of contents: "CHAPTER 28. Ahab."

question: What is the title of Chapter 110 in Moby-Dick?
reference: Table of contents: "CHAPTER 110. Queequeg in His Coffin."

question: Who is the author of Moby-Dick?
reference: Title page: "By Herman Melville"

question: What is the full title of Moby-Dick as given on its title page?
reference: Title page

question: According to NIST SP 800-53, what is the exact number of days after which a user password must expire?
expected_answer: NOT IN DOCUMENT — NIST SP 800-53 deliberately leaves this as an organization-defined parameter, not a fixed number
reference: No fixed value exists anywhere in the document; all such parameters are written as [Assignment: organization-defined ...]

question: What CVE identifier does NIST SP 800-53's control RA-5 (Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning) cite as an example vulnerability?
expected_answer: NOT IN DOCUMENT — RA-5 discusses vulnerability scanning generically and cites no specific CVE numbers
reference: RA-5 control text and discussion contain no CVE references

question: What is the name of Captain Ahab's wife in Moby-Dick?
expected_answer: NOT IN DOCUMENT — Ahab's wife and child are mentioned in passing (Chapter 132, "The Symphony") but she is never named
reference: "...I see my wife and my child in thine eye..." — no name given anywhere in the novel

question: In what exact year is the story of Moby-Dick stated to take place?
expected_answer: NOT IN DOCUMENT — the novel deliberately never gives an exact year
reference: Opening line only says "Some years ago—never mind how long precisely"

question: According to NIST SP 800-53, what account management policy did Captain Ahab establish for the Pequod's crew?
expected_answer: NOT IN DOCUMENT — nonsensical cross-document mixing; NIST SP 800-53 and Moby-Dick share no content
reference: N/A — this question mixes two unrelated documents on purpose
